title: carex longissima
intro: Carex longissima, also known as quaking grass or quaking grass sedge, is a type of perennial grass sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex longissima include relief from various digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Carex longissima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
